input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.4.3
            TITLE: all voltage sense wires to the ams must meet one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.4.3: All voltage sense wires to the AMS must meet one of:
EV.7.4.3 All voltage sense wires to the AMS must meet one of:   
a. Have Overcurrent Protection EV.7.4.4 below 
b. Meet requirements for no Overcurrent Protection listed in EV.7.4.5 below
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 103 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: All voltage sense wires to the AMS must meet one of: a. Have Overcurrent Protection EV.7.4.4 below b. Meet requirements for no Overcurrent Protection listed in EV.7.4.5 below
